headline: Can These Beaten Down Stocks Turn Things Around? NKE, ADBE
summary: NIKE has struggled to capture what its consumers want, with a loss of shelf space also reducing its presence to the consumer. Adobe is at risk of considerable disruption from the broader AI outlook. Can upcoming earnings releases this month help turn sentiment around?

headline: CTL Expands Leadership Team with New Chief Financial Officer
summary: CTL Corporation, a technology lifecycle solutions provider, announced today that it has appointed Dan Rodgers as its new Chief Financial Officer. Drawing from decades of leadership, Mr. Rodgers will pivot CTL's financial strategy from historical reporting to a forward-looking growth model focused on long-term capital strategy. By optimizing internal systems and utilizing analytical insights, he will ensure CTL's resources are strategically deployed to fund expansion while maximizing ROI.

By optimizing internal systems and utilizing analytical insights, he will ensure CTL's resources are strategically deployed to fund expansion while maximizing ROI.

headline: Has Nike Lost Its Edge in Performance Running?
summary: The debate over Nike's turnaround often centers on margins and inventory. But the deeper issue may lie in performance running, the category that has historically defined its pricing power.

headline: Sportswear brand On sees possible boost from lower US tariff rate
summary: March 3 (Reuters) - On Holding sees lower U. tariff rates after the Supreme Court struck down the government's emergency levies as a possible ‌boost for the fast-growing Swiss sportswear brand, CEO Martin Hoffmann said on Tuesday ‌as it delivered strong quarterly results.

headline: Nike Restructuring And China Pressures Test New CEO Turnaround Plan
summary: Nike (NYSE:NKE) is reportedly preparing a major restructuring as it contends with weak consumer demand and high inventory levels. Distributors in China, including Pou Sheng, have issued profit warnings that highlight pressure on Nike’s China business. The company has rescheduled its earnings report, which has raised expectations of substantial corporate changes. New CEO Elliott Hill is rolling out a turnaround plan focused on reviving growth and rebuilding wholesale partnerships. Nike is a...
